flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cairn University-Langhorne fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (46.3% → 33.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Cairn University-Langhorne vs the 2003–2007 baseline (782 vs 997).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cairn University-Langhorne rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.9k → $19.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cairn University-Langhorne fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
